# SCORE Small Business Resource Hubs Map

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, resource-hubs, topics, industries, special-populations

## Resource purpose
Map of SCORE’s stage hubs, business-topic hubs, industry hubs, and entrepreneur-group hubs.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when BOSS needs a structured menu of SCORE hub pages rather than individual articles. This file is the topic/industry/special-population map.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Key resources or subresources
- Plan + Start: https://www.score.org/plan-start/ — Early-stage startup path.
- Manage + Grow: https://www.score.org/manage-grow/ — Operating and growth-stage path.
- Transition + Exit: https://www.score.org/transition-exit/ — Exit and transition path.
- Employee to Entrepreneur: https://www.score.org/employee-to-entrepreneur/ — Transitioning from employment to entrepreneurship.
- Marketing: https://www.score.org/marketing/ — Marketing hub.
- Finance and Accounting: https://www.score.org/finance-accounting/ — Finance and accounting hub.
- Technology: https://www.score.org/technology/ — Technology hub.
- Management and Operations: https://www.score.org/management-operations/ — Operations hub.
- Legal and Government: https://www.score.org/legal-government/ — Legal/government education hub.
- Disaster Preparation and Recovery: https://www.score.org/disaster-prep-recovery/ — Business continuity and recovery hub.
- Manufacturing: https://www.score.org/resources-manufacturing/ — Industry hub.
- Food Services: https://www.score.org/resources-food-services/ — Industry hub.
- Retail: https://www.score.org/resources-retail/ — Industry hub.
- Veteran Entrepreneurs: https://www.score.org/veteran-entrepreneurs-resource-hub/ — Special entrepreneur group hub.
- Rural Entrepreneurs: https://www.score.org/rural-entrepreneurs-resource-hub/ — Special entrepreneur group hub.
- Women Entrepreneurs: https://www.score.org/women-entrepreneurs-resource-hub/ — Special entrepreneur group hub.

## BOSS routing notes
- Use hubs to narrow the library quickly by stage, business function, industry, or special eligibility flag.
- Special-population hubs should be presented as resources, not eligibility guarantees.

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
